body: {"q": "run", "hits": [{"f": "install.ps1", "l": 265, "txt": "        Write-Info \"[mcp dry-run] would write $File\"", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 278, "txt": "        Write-Info \"[mcp dry-run] claude mcp add -s user $McpName -- $cmd mcp\"", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 295, "txt": "        Write-Info \"[mcp dry-run] codex mcp add $McpName -- $cmd mcp\"", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 360, "txt": "        Write-Info \"[mcp dry-run] would write $file\"", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 473, "txt": "                # Remove-Item on a running .exe is a no-op (the file stays", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 476, "txt": "                # because the running process keeps its handle to the old", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 498, "txt": "            # stub or a truncated download.", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 501, "txt": "                throw \"Installed $dest is only $($installed.Length) bytes - this is almost certainly an antivirus quaran", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 514, "txt": "        # Always run a self-test. The cost is a single `--version` invocation;", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 515, "txt": "        # the benefit is that we catch the \"installed but won't run\" failure", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "install.ps1", "l": 542, "txt": "            Write-Host \"     Then add an exclusion for $InstallDir and re-run.\"", "target": "run", "d": 1}, {"f": "docs/MENTION_SYSTEM_PLAN.md", "l": 4, "txt": "> Goal: make `ffs_search::FilePicker` the fastes[truncated to budget]
